name: core_infra
description: Multi-provider VM fabric: WireGuard underlay, VXLAN overlay, gossip discovery, identity scheme, host tuning, and the `infra` verb surface (ADR-0014).

consider.reason: Cluster identity, seed list, and provider knobs live in repo config.
Skill body for the fabric agent role; primary ownership stays with the skills Facet (ADR-0004).
ADR contract for the fabric; primary ownership stays with the root Facet (docs/adr/**).
Credential-shape ignores (*.token, *.key, *.pem, .env) gate accidental commits of provider/runner secrets.

commands.name: infra
commands.purpose: Multi-provider VM fabric verb: adopt an SSH-reachable host onto the inventory, list adopted hosts and last-known reachability.
